_note: 350M from-scratch pharma SLM, ~4B tokens each (stopped early). MedMCQA chance=0.25, PubMedQA chance~0.33-0.5.

prod_d75._finding: best pretraining val-loss but worst downstream QA -> over-repetition overfit (1B corpus x ~9 epochs)

key_finding: Balanced 45-60% domain mix wins downstream; max-domain (75%) overfits. Lower perplexity != better answers. SFT improves every metric, esp PubMedQA.
